name: Arizer XQ2 Balloon Connector
summary: This official Arizer Balloon Connector is specially designed for use with the Arizer XQ2 glass balloon mouthpiece and replacement balloon packs.
description: This official Arizer Balloon Connector is specially designed for use with the Arizer XQ2 glass balloon mouthpiece and replacement balloon packs. It enables quick and easy replacement and adjustment of balloons to fit your desired size. Made of lightweight plastic, it connects your XQ2 glass mouthpiece to the balloon. To optimise your experience, we suggest using it with the XQ2 Balloon Cap Pack to trap and preserve dense clouds until you are ready to use them. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
